title: Card html field served unsanitized — potential stored XSS
description: The CardData.html field (populated from og:video:url) is stored as-is and served in the card JSON as "html": card.html. Mastodon clients render this field as an iframe embed. If a malicious page sets og:video:url to a javascript: URL or an HTML string with <script>, a naive client could execute it. While well-behaved Mastodon clients sanitize this, the server should not rely on client-side sanitization. Fix: validate that the html field is either empty or a valid URL (https only), or apply allowlist-based HTML sanitization if full embed HTML is needed.
